# Publisher Glossary

**Document Class:** Knowledge Base

**Status:** Stable

**Author:** SvitloSk Project

---

# Purpose

This document defines the canonical vocabulary for Publisher.

---

# Core Terms

## Publisher

**Definition:** The logical Role responsible for preparing and distributing Publications.

**Category:** Role

**Evidence:** GLOSSARY §3, CASE-PUB-001

---

## Publication

**Definition:** A public information message generated by the SvitloSk system for distribution through one or more supported communication channels.

**Category:** Object

**Evidence:** GLOSSARY §3

---

## Information Product

**Definition:** A discrete unit of information produced by SvitloSk.

**Category:** Object

**Evidence:** CASE-INFPROD-001

---

## Journal Edition

**Definition:** One daily instance of the Journal containing all Publications.

**Category:** Object

**Evidence:** CASE-JRN-001, CASE-INFPROD-001

---

## Journal

**Definition:** The ongoing public information service that continuously publishes information about electricity supply.

**Category:** Service

**Evidence:** CHARTER §10, CASE-JRN-001

---

## Lifecycle

**Definition:** A pattern describing how information flows through the system.

**Category:** Pattern

**Evidence:** CASE-LC-001, CASE-PUB-004

---

## Representation

**Definition:** A channel-specific output of information.

**Category:** Object

**Evidence:** CASE-INF-001, CASE-TG-CORE-001

---

## Information

**Definition:** Factual content from official sources.

**Category:** Concept

**Evidence:** CASE-INF-001

---

## Knowledge

**Definition:** Interpreted information that improves understanding.

**Category:** Concept

**Evidence:** CASE-INF-001

---

## Parser

**Definition:** The component responsible for retrieving Open Data from approved Data Sources.

**Category:** Component

**Evidence:** GLOSSARY §2, CASE-SVT-ONTOLOGY-001

---

## Adapter

**Definition:** A channel-specific implementation of publishing.

**Category:** Component

**Evidence:** CASE-SVT-ONTOLOGY-001, CASE-TG-CORE-001

---

## Territory

**Definition:** A geographic unit for publication organization.

**Category:** Reference

**Evidence:** GLOSSARY §4, CASE-INFPROD-001

---

# Domain Terms

## Queue Schedule

**Definition:** Official emergency electricity limitation schedule with 6 queues and 12 subqueues.

**Category:** Domain A

**Evidence:** CASE-SVT-ONTOLOGY-001, Architect Intent

---

## Planned Outage

**Definition:** Address-based official planned maintenance.

**Category:** Domain B

**Evidence:** CASE-SVT-ONTOLOGY-001, CASE-INFPROD-001

---

## Emergency Outage

**Definition:** Address-based unexpected electricity outage.

**Category:** Domain C

**Evidence:** CASE-SVT-ONTOLOGY-001, CASE-INFPROD-001

---

# Product Terms

## Emergency Outage Publication

**Definition:** Information Product containing emergency outage information for one Territory.

**Category:** Product

**Evidence:** CASE-INFPROD-001

---

## Planned Outage Publication (Today)

**Definition:** Information Product containing today's planned outage information for one Territory.

**Category:** Product

**Evidence:** CASE-INFPROD-001

---

## Planned Outage Publication (Tomorrow)

**Definition:** TEMPORARY Information Product containing tomorrow's planned outage information for one Territory.

**Category:** Product

**Evidence:** CASE-INFPROD-001

---

## Queue Graph Publication (Tomorrow)

**Definition:** COMPOSITE Information Product containing tomorrow's queue schedule visualization.

**Category:** Product

**Evidence:** CASE-INFPROD-001, CASE-TG-CORE-001

---

## Technical Publication

**Definition:** Information Product containing system updates and technical information.

**Category:** Product

**Evidence:** CASE-INFPROD-001

---

## Service Publication (Future)

**Definition:** Information Product containing future project announcements.

**Category:** Product

**Evidence:** CASE-INFPROD-001

---

# Lifecycle Terms

## Generated

**Definition:** Publication has been created from normalized data but not yet published.

**Category:** State

**Evidence:** TELEGRAM_LIFECYCLE.md

---

## Published

**Definition:** Publication is live and visible to readers.

**Category:** State

**Evidence:** TELEGRAM_LIFECYCLE.md

---

## Updated

**Definition:** Publication has been modified.

**Category:** State

**Evidence:** TELEGRAM_LIFECYCLE.md

---

## Archived

**Definition:** Publication is preserved as historical record.

**Category:** State

**Evidence:** TELEGRAM_LIFECYCLE.md

---

## Removed

**Definition:** Publication has been deleted from channel.

**Category:** State

**Evidence:** TELEGRAM_LIFECYCLE.md

---

| Category | Terms | Count |
|----------|-------|-------|
| Core | Publisher, Publication, Information Product, Journal Edition, Journal, Lifecycle, Representation, Information, Knowledge, Parser, Adapter, Territory | 12 |
| Domain | Queue Schedule, Planned Outage, Emergency Outage | 3 |
| Product | Emergency Outage Publication, Planned Outage Publication (Today), Planned Outage Publication (Tomorrow), Queue Graph Publication (Tomorrow), Technical Publication, Service Publication (Future) | 6 |
| Lifecycle | Generated, Published, Updated, Archived, Removed | 5 |
| **Total** | | **26** |

---

**End of Glossary**
